content.value: End-to-end sourcing, factory verification, quality control, and global logistics for machinery, electronics, agriculture technology, and construction materials.

industries.title: Industrial Instruments
industries.description: Precision tools, testing instruments, sensors, and measurement systems.

industries.title: Machinery & Equipment
industries.description: Industrial machinery, production lines, agricultural machines.

industries.title: Electronics
industries.description: Consumer electronics, industrial electronics, components, and PCBs.

industries.title: Building Materials
industries.description: Marble, granite, ceramic tiles, sanitary ware.

services.title: Sourcing & Verification
services.description: We leverage our extensive database and local network to identify manufacturers that meet your specific quality, capacity, and certification requirements.

services.title: Factory Verification & Audit
services.description: We conduct on-site audits to verify factory legitimacy, production capabilities, working conditions, and quality management systems (ISO 9001).

services.title: Price Negotiation
services.description: Our local team negotiates directly with factories to secure the best possible pricing and payment terms, overcoming language and cultural barriers.

services.title: Sample Development
services.description: We coordinate the sampling process, ensuring prototypes match your specifications before mass production begins.

services.title: Production Monitoring
services.description: We keep a close eye on production schedules and milestones, providing you with regular updates and photos from the factory floor.

services.title: Quality Inspection
services.description: Our engineers perform rigorous inspections at various stages: Pre-production, During Production (DUPRO), and Pre-shipment Inspection (PSI).

services.title: Export Compliance
services.description: We handle all necessary export documentation, certificates of origin, and compliance with international trade regulations.

services.title: Global Logistics
services.description: From EXW to DDP, we coordinate freight forwarding, customs clearance, and final delivery to your warehouse anywhere in the world.

blog_posts.title: 5 Common Mistakes When Sourcing Machinery from China
blog_posts.excerpt: Sourcing heavy equipment requires a different approach than consumer goods. Learn the critical pitfalls to avoid.

blog_posts.title: Understanding Incoterms 2020: A Guide for Importers
blog_posts.excerpt: FOB, EXW, CIF, DDP - what do they mean for your costs and liability? We break down the most common shipping terms.
